task_completion.description: Navigate to the Business Details form in Manager.io.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io application is open, and the 'Business Details' form (usually accessed via Settings) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Update the Business Name to 'Northwind Traders Ltd.'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' text field in the Business Details form contains exactly 'Northwind Traders Ltd.'.

task_completion.description: Update the Address to the specified multi-line address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Address' text area contains '456 Commerce Boulevard', 'Suite 200', 'Chicago, IL 60601', and 'United States'.
The 'Email' text field in the Business Details form contains exactly 'accounts@northwindtraders.com'.
The changes are saved, evidenced by the agent clicking the 'Update' button, or the updated business name 'Northwind Traders Ltd.' appearing in the top-left navigation bar of the Manager.io interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the Manager.io graphical user interface to configure the details.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Manager.io web interface (buttons, text fields) rather than terminal commands or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is Manager.io, not a text editor, mock interface, or a separate document.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or direct database modifications to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQLite commands or curl requests modifying the Manager.io backend directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial business name is 'Northwind Traders'. The agent must update the Business Name to 'Northwind Traders Ltd.', the Address to '456 Commerce Boulevard, Suite 200, Chicago, IL 60601, United States', and the Email to 'accounts@northwindtraders.com'.
